_meta.methodology: Manual static analysis — grep + file read across src/. Component imports, JSX/Astro element occurrences, and raw CSS class usage each catalogued by file and line number. Runtime instance counts are estimates derived from current data arrays (experiments: 4, diary entries: 2, work projects: 3, skills: 6). This file will be replaced by automated generation in a future phase.
_meta.lastUpdatedNote: Phase 4 migration: Hero.astro, AboutSection.astro, and diary/[slug].astro migrated from raw CSS patterns to system components. Button fully adopted, Link partially adopted, Badge skill variant migrated.

excluded: src/pages/design-system/components.astro — imports all 5 components for documentation demos only, not product usage
scope.note: DS pages (design-system/*) use back-link and footer-nav-link raw classes for page navigation. These are catalogued separately under Link rawCssMimics with scope 'ds-pages'.

approximateFields: estimatedRuntimeInstances — depends on live data (diary entries, experiments, projects, nav items)
runtimeCount in rawCssMimics entries that are inside loops or dynamic renders

directSourceInstanceDetail.context: inside skills.map() — Phase 4 migration from about-skill-tag raw span

estimatedRuntimeBreakdown.note: Based on 4 experiments (2 comingSoon), 2 diary entries, 6 skills.

rawCssMimics.migrationNote: WorkSection.jsx is a React island — cannot import Badge.astro.
WorkSection.jsx is a React island. Raw JSX manually replicates the two-span DOM structure (outer badge + inner dot span) — correctly matches Badge.astro output.

blockedUsages.reason: React island cannot import Astro components. Permanently blocked unless WorkSection is converted to Astro or Badge is ported to React.

directSourceInstanceDetail.context: inside experiments.map(), variant driven by exp.accent flag

estimatedRuntimeBreakdown.note: Based on 4 experiments (1 with accent:true) + 2 diary entries.

components.notes: Only system component with zero raw CSS mimics. 100% import-based wherever it appears in product code.

directSourceInstanceDetail.context: CTA — renders as <a href='/design-system'>. Phase 4 migration from hero-cta-primary raw <a>.
CTA — renders as <button> with onclick nav. Phase 4 migration from hero-cta-secondary raw <button>.

components.notes: Fully adopted after Phase 4 migration. Both hero CTAs migrated from raw classes to <Button>. Zero remaining raw class usages in product code.

directSourceInstanceDetail.context: GitHub social link — external. Phase 4 migration from hero-social-link raw <a>.
LinkedIn social link — external. Phase 4 migration from hero-social-link raw <a>.
Article header back-home link. Phase 4 migration.
Article footer back-home link. Phase 4 migration.
Article footer scroll-to-top link — passes onclick via rest props. Phase 4 migration.

rawCssMimics.runtimeCount: N (one per nav item, dynamic — rendered via map over nav sections)
rawCssMimics.migrationNote: Two independent blockers: (1) Header.jsx is a React island — cannot import Link.astro. (2) These are <button> elements with onClick scroll-to-section behavior; Link always renders <a> and cannot carry click-handler-only scroll navigation. Both blockers must be resolved simultaneously to migrate.
Same dual blocker as Header nav-link: React island + onClick scroll behavior requiring <button> element.
Footer.jsx is a React island — cannot import Link.astro. Could migrate if Footer were converted to Astro.
All DS pages are Astro files. components.astro already imports Link for demos — could reuse the same import.

All DS pages are Astro files — feasible to use <Link variant='footer-nav'>. components.astro already has Link imported. Ironic: the DS components showcase page uses raw link classes in its own navigation.

blockedUsages.reason: React island + onClick scroll-to-section behavior. Link renders <a> only — cannot substitute a scroll handler button.
React island. The <button> instances (scroll-to-section) are additionally permanently blocked by element type constraint.

components.notes: Partially adopted after Phase 4 migration. on-dark (Hero social links) and back (diary pages) variants now use direct imports. nav and footer-nav remain raw — permanently blocked by React island + scroll-button constraint. back-link still raw in DS pages (feasible, not yet migrated). The default variant is not used anywhere in product code.

rawCssMimics.migrationNote: Footer.jsx is a React island — cannot import IconButton.astro. The raw pattern is the documented correct fallback: <button className='icon-btn' aria-label='...'><Icon size={20} /></button>. This is not a defect.

blockedUsages.reason: React island cannot import Astro components. Blocked unless Footer is converted to Astro or IconButton is ported to React.

components.notes: Single known usage, architecturally blocked. No usage in any Astro file — there is no feasible migration opportunity in the current codebase without a structural change.

totalImportBasedInstances.note: Badge (4 source / ~14 runtime) + Card (2 source / ~6 runtime) + Button (2 source / 2 runtime) + Link (5 source / 5 runtime)

productScope.note: nav-link (N dynamic) + footer-nav-link as button (N dynamic) + footer-nav-link as a (N dynamic) + work-tag (3) + work-coming-soon-badge (2). Hero and diary raw patterns migrated in Phase 4.

dsPagesScope.note: Static — 4 back-link + 9 footer-nav-link across DS route pages. Not yet migrated.

permanentlyBlocked: Header.jsx nav-link — React island + scroll-to-section button behavior
Footer.jsx footer-nav-link as button — React island + scroll-to-section button behavior
blocked: Footer.jsx footer-nav-link as a — React island
